label: Thought
description: Defines a mood effect, memory, or situational opinion modifier that can be applied to a pawn.

thoughtClass.label: Thought class
thoughtClass.description: C# type used to instantiate the thought object. Defaults to Thought_Memory for memories or Thought_Situational for situational thoughts.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# ThoughtWorker type that evaluates when this situational thought applies. Required for situational thoughts; omit for memories.

stages.label: Stages
stages.description: Ordered list of thought stages. The active stage index is determined by the thought worker or memory state.

stackLimit.label: Stack limit
stackLimit.description: Maximum number of identical thought instances that can stack on the same pawn.

stackedEffectMultiplier.label: Stacked effect multiplier
stackedEffectMultiplier.description: Mood multiplier applied to each stacked thought beyond the first.

stagesStack.label: Stages stack
stagesStack.description: If true, stacking multiple instances advances the stage index rather than multiplying effects.

durationDays.label: Duration (days)
durationDays.description: How many in-game days a memory thought lasts before expiring. Zero means it does not expire automatically.

invert.label: Invert
invert.description: If true, the thought worker's current-state result is inverted (active becomes inactive and vice versa).

validWhileDespawned.label: Valid while despawned
validWhileDespawned.description: If true, memory thoughts remain active even when the pawn is not on the map.

nextThought.label: Next thought
nextThought.description: ThoughtDef given to the pawn after this memory expires.

producesMemoryThought.label: Produces memory thought
producesMemoryThought.description: ThoughtDef added as a memory when this situational thought becomes active.

nullifyingTraits.label: Nullifying traits
nullifyingTraits.description: TraitDefs that prevent this thought from being applied when present on the pawn.

neverNullifyIfAnyTrait.label: Never nullify if any trait
neverNullifyIfAnyTrait.description: TraitDefs that prevent any other nullifying trait from suppressing this thought. The thought is kept if the pawn has any of these.

nullifyingTraitDegrees.label: Nullifying trait degrees
nullifyingTraitDegrees.description: Trait-and-degree pairs that nullify this thought. Each child element is named by the TraitDef and contains the degree value. Duplicate trait entries are allowed for different degrees.

nullifyingOwnTales.label: Nullifying own tales
nullifyingOwnTales.description: TaleDefs that suppress this thought when present in the pawn's tale recorder.

nullifyingPrecepts.label: Nullifying precepts
nullifyingPrecepts.description: PreceptDefs from the pawn's ideo that nullify this thought when held.

nullifyingHediffs.label: Nullifying hediffs
nullifyingHediffs.description: HediffDefs that suppress this thought when active on the pawn.

nullifyingGenes.label: Nullifying genes
nullifyingGenes.description: GeneDefs that suppress this thought when present on the pawn.

requiredTraits.label: Required traits
requiredTraits.description: TraitDefs that must all be present on the pawn for this thought to apply.

requiredGenes.label: Required genes
requiredGenes.description: GeneDefs that must all be present on the pawn for this thought to apply.

requiredTraitsDegree.label: Required traits degree
requiredTraitsDegree.description: Exact trait degree all requiredTraits entries must match. When set to int.MinValue (the default), any degree is accepted.

requiredHediffs.label: Required hediffs
requiredHediffs.description: HediffDefs that must all be active on the pawn for this thought to apply.

effectMultiplyingStat.label: Effect multiplying stat
effectMultiplyingStat.description: StatDef whose value on the pawn is fed into effectMultiplyingStatCurve to scale mood/opinion effects.

effectMultiplyingStatCurve.label: Effect multiplying stat curve
effectMultiplyingStatCurve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping the effectMultiplyingStat value to a mood/opinion multiplier.

hediff.label: Hediff
hediff.description: HediffDef associated with this thought. Used by some worker classes to check hediff presence or severity.

mentalState.label: Mental state
mentalState.description: MentalStateDef associated with this thought. Used to query or apply mental break conditions.

gameCondition.label: Game condition
gameCondition.description: GameConditionDef that must be active on the map for this thought to apply.

nullifiedIfNotColonist.label: Nullified if not colonist
nullifiedIfNotColonist.description: If true, this thought is suppressed for non-colonist pawns.

thoughtToMake.label: Thought to make
thoughtToMake.description: ThoughtDef added to the pawn under specific trigger conditions defined by the thought worker.

icon.label: Icon
icon.description: Texture path for the icon shown next to this thought in the mood breakdown.

showBubble.label: Show bubble
showBubble.description: If true, a speech bubble is displayed above the pawn when this thought is gained.

minExpectation.label: Min expectation
minExpectation.description: ExpectationDef that must be active for this thought to apply. Only used for positive thoughts gated on expectation level.

minExpectationForNegativeThought.label: Min expectation (negative thought)
minExpectationForNegativeThought.description: ExpectationDef that must be active for this negative thought to apply.

replaceThoughts.label: Replace thoughts
replaceThoughts.description: ThoughtDefs removed from the pawn when this thought is added.

developmentalStageFilter.label: Developmental stage filter
developmentalStageFilter.description: DevelopmentalStage flags (comma-separated) controlling which life stages this thought applies to. Defaults to Child and Adult.

chemicalDef.label: Chemical
chemicalDef.description: ChemicalDef associated with this thought. Used by addiction and drug-related thought workers.

lerpMoodToZero.label: Lerp mood to zero
lerpMoodToZero.description: If true, the mood effect fades linearly to zero as the memory approaches its expiry.

stackLimitForSameOtherPawn.label: Stack limit (same other pawn)
stackLimitForSameOtherPawn.description: Maximum stacks allowed when multiple instances reference the same other pawn. -1 means no separate limit.

lerpOpinionToZeroAfterDurationPct.label: Lerp opinion to zero after duration pct
lerpOpinionToZeroAfterDurationPct.description: Fraction of durationDays after which the opinion offset begins fading linearly to zero.

socialTargetDevelopmentalStageFilter.label: Social target developmental stage filter
socialTargetDevelopmentalStageFilter.description: DevelopmentalStage flags (comma-separated) controlling which life stages are valid social targets for this thought. Defaults to Child and Adult.

ignoreSubhumans.label: Ignore subhumans
ignoreSubhumans.description: If true, this thought does not apply to subhuman pawns (hussar-type entities without full pawn cognition).

doNotApplyToQuestLodgers.label: Do not apply to quest lodgers
doNotApplyToQuestLodgers.description: If true, this thought is not applied to temporary guest colonists from quests.

maxCumulatedOpinionOffset.label: Max cumulated opinion offset
maxCumulatedOpinionOffset.description: Upper bound on the total opinion offset that can accumulate from all stacks of this thought.

taleDef.label: Tale
taleDef.description: TaleDef associated with this thought, used for tale-triggered memory conditions.

gender.label: Gender
gender.description: If set to Male or Female, this thought only applies to pawns of that gender.

labelInBracketsExtraForHediff.label: Label in brackets (hediff extra)
labelInBracketsExtraForHediff.description: Extra bracketed text appended to the thought label when the thought is associated with a hediff. Supports translation keys.

basic-memory-thought.label: Basic memory thought
basic-memory-thought.description: A memory thought with a duration and one stage.

basic-situational-thought.label: Basic situational thought
basic-situational-thought.description: A situational thought evaluated each tick by a worker class.
